strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise directly matching the core required stack, with production-scale experience at Optilyz and re:cinq
Proven full-stack delivery across backend APIs, frontend (Ember.js, React-adjacent), cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and database layers
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and open-source project ownership demonstrate clean architecture values aligned with the role's expectations
concerns: Severely overqualified — 15+ years of Staff/Senior-level experience creates a fundamental mismatch with a Junior/Mid entry-level position, raising salary alignment and retention risk
No explicit NestJS experience mentioned, and primary database experience skews toward MongoDB; PostgreSQL familiarity is not directly evidenced
Listed location is San Francisco, USA, which conflicts with the high on-site presence requirement unless relocation is confirmed (German phone number introduces ambiguity)
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically accomplished engineer whose skills comfortably cover and exceed the required stack, but the role is explicitly entry-level and the candidate operates at Staff/Senior level with over a decade of industry experience — this seniority gap is the dominant factor and makes a straightforward fit unlikely unless the company intends to re-scope the role or the candidate has specific reasons to accept a step-down position. Location ambiguity adds a secondary practical concern given the high on-site requirement.
